'''Meridian''', also known as '''Meridias''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
It was inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] which formed the [[Grissmath Dynasty]] and was used as the government's capital. The nearby bleak, desert planet [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] was used by the Dynasty as a penal colony from around [[700 BBY]] and prisoners were sent there for generations.<ref name="POT:WE">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20020905twilight|text=The Planet of Twilight}}</ref>

Meridian's surface was eventually reduced to a charred radioactive wasteland<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and the Grissmath Dynasty faded out of history. However, those on Nam Chorios survived the extinction of their mother civilization.<ref name="POT:WE" />

{{Planet-stub}}
